notes: Manually copy contents of steam/steamapps/common/Freespace 2/Registry/FS2.reg into steam/steamapps/common/Freespace 2/Registry/system.reg.  Make sure to change the key path format from [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Volition\FreeSpace2] to match the others already here.
title: Freespace 2
